name: EvoAir Holdings Inc.
business: EvoAir Holdings Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells eco-friendly HVAC products, including air-conditioners and Ionic Nano Copper Zinc solutions, primarily to domestic customers in Malaysia and to overseas customers.

exposures.sentence: The ongoing success of our business depends on our ability to continue to introduce innovative eco-friendly HVAC products to meet evolving market trends and satisfy changing customer demands.
We have experienced cyber-based attacks and, due to the evolving threat landscape, may continue to experience them going forward, potentially with more frequency or severity.
The effects of climate change, including extreme weather conditions, create financial risks to our business.
